w:r.w:t: CMMC Level 2 / NIST SP 800-171 Documentation Package
Annual review or upon significant system change
Annual review or upon significant system change
The system includes managed endpoints, Microsoft 365 GCC High collaboration services, identity services, backup, monitoring, and support workflows used by authorized personnel.
Business Function: Supports contract execution, engineering collaboration, and CUI document handling.
The boundary includes managed Windows endpoints, Microsoft 365 GCC High, Entra ID, Intune, Defender, backup services, remote users, and approved external providers supporting CUI operations.
The boundary includes systems, users, endpoints, cloud services, external providers, and data flows used to store, process, transmit, or protect CUI.

Authorized users include employees, contractors, administrators, system owners, and external support personnel approved through ServiceNow. Access is removed through HR termination ticket triggers same-day account disablement and access review..
Locations: Akron, OH headquarters; remote engineering staff
Infrastructure: Microsoft 365 GCC High; Azure Government; managed Windows endpoints; remote users
Security Stack: Entra ID; Intune; Defender; Sentinel
IT/Security: operates identity, endpoint, monitoring, backup, and access controls.
Compliance Owner: maintains SSP, policies, procedures, POA&M references, and assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses AC.L2-3.1.1 (Authorized Access Control) through access authorization, account provisioning, session control, and access review processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Limit system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices, including other systems. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: ticketing system: ServiceNow; mfa solution: Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access; endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; access removal process: HR termination ticket triggers same-day account disablement and access review.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Authorized users are identified. b. Processes acting on behalf of authorized users are identified. c. Devices and other systems authorized to connect are identified.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: Lloyd CMMC limits access for AC.L2-3.1.17 (Wireless Access Protection) by authorizing users, processes, and devices before access is granted to systems within the CUI environment described as: CUI is stored in GCC High Cloud PC. Access requests are initiated through Email and Forms and are aligned to the HR onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Authentication is supported by Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access. Endpoint access is governed through Microsoft Intune.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
AC.L2-3.1.19 - Encrypt CUI on Mobile Devices

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier limits access for AC.L2-3.1.19 (Encrypt CUI on Mobile Devices) by authorizing users, processes, and devices before access is granted to systems within the CUI environment described as: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.. Access requests are initiated through ServiceNow and are aligned to the HR onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Authentication is supported by Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access. Endpoint access is governed through Microsoft Intune.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier limits access for AC.L2-3.1.6 (Non-Privileged Account Use) by authorizing users, processes, and devices before access is granted to systems within the CUI environment described as: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.. Access requests are initiated through ServiceNow and are aligned to the HR onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Authentication is supported by Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access. Endpoint access is governed through Microsoft Intune.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses AC.L2-3.1.9 (Privacy and Security Notices) through access authorization, account provisioning, session control, and access review processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: ticketing system: ServiceNow; mfa solution: Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access; endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; access removal process: HR termination ticket triggers same-day account disablement and access review.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Privacy and Security Notices is documented and implemented. b. Privacy and Security Notices is reviewed for assessment evidence.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses AT.L2-3.2.2 (Role-Based Training) through security awareness, role-based training, and workforce acknowledgement processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Ensure personnel are trained to carry out assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.; ticketing system: ServiceNow. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Role-Based Training is documented and implemented. b. Role-Based Training is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses AT.L2-3.2.3 (Insider Threat Awareness) through security awareness, role-based training, and workforce acknowledgement processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.; ticketing system: ServiceNow. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Insider Threat Awareness is documented and implemented. b. Insider Threat Awareness is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses AU.L2-3.3.1 (System Auditing) through audit logging, event review, log retention, and investigation processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Create and retain system audit logs and records to enable monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized activity. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: cloud environment: Microsoft 365 GCC High and Azure Government; endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; ticketing system: ServiceNow. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. System Auditing is documented and implemented. b. System Auditing is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier limits access for AU.L2-3.3.2 (User Accountability) by authorizing users, processes, and devices before access is granted to systems within the CUI environment described as: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.. Access requests are initiated through ServiceNow and are aligned to the HR onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Authentication is supported by Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access. Endpoint access is governed through Microsoft Intune.

Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: AVCOR addresses AU.L2-3.3.6 (Reduction and Reporting) through audit logging, event review, log retention, and investigation processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support analysis and reporting. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: cloud environment: Microsoft 365 GCC High and Azure Government; endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; ticketing system: Email and Form. Activities are tracked through Email and Form when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Reduction and Reporting is documented and implemented. b. Reduction and Reporting is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses CM.L2-3.4.1 (Baseline Configuration) through baseline configuration, change approval, asset inventory, and configuration enforcement processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; ticketing system: ServiceNow; cloud environment: Microsoft 365 GCC High and Azure Government. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Baseline Configuration is documented and implemented. b. Baseline Configuration is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses IA.L2-3.5.10 (Cryptographic Password Storage) through identity lifecycle, authentication, MFA, and credential management processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Store and transmit only cryptographically protected passwords. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: mfa solution: Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access; ticketing system: ServiceNow; hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.; access removal process: HR termination ticket triggers same-day account disablement and access review.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Cryptographic Password Storage is documented and implemented. b. Cryptographic Password Storage is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses MP.L2-3.8.3 (Media Sanitization) through CUI media handling, marking, transport, sanitization, and backup protection processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Sanitize or destroy system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: cui environment: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.; backup solution: Azure Backup with immutable retention; endpoint management: Microsoft Intune. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Media Sanitization is documented and implemented. b. Media Sanitization is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses PE.L2-3.10.3 (Escort Visitors) through facility access authorization, visitor management, physical monitoring, and alternate worksite processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: locations: Akron, OH headquarters; remote engineering staff; cui environment: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.; hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Escort Visitors is documented and implemented. b. Escort Visitors is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses PE.L2-3.10.4 (Physical Access Logs) through facility access authorization, visitor management, physical monitoring, and alternate worksite processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Maintain audit logs of physical access. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: locations: Akron, OH headquarters; remote engineering staff; cui environment: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.; hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Physical Access Logs is documented and implemented. b. Physical Access Logs is reviewed for assessment evidence.
Implementation: Implementation statement has not been generated; document during SSP review.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses PE.L2-3.10.6 (Alternate Work Sites) through facility access authorization, visitor management, physical monitoring, and alternate worksite processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: locations: Akron, OH headquarters; remote engineering staff; cui environment: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.; hr onboarding process: HR opens onboarding ticket after signed offer and manager approval.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Alternate Work Sites is documented and implemented. b. Alternate Work Sites is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Implementation: Example Defense Supplier addresses SI.L2-3.14.2 (Malicious Code Protection) through vulnerability remediation, malicious code protection, alert monitoring, and system integrity processes for the CUI environment. The control requirement is: Provide protection from malicious code at designated locations. The documented implementation uses the following company-specific context: endpoint management: Microsoft Intune; ticketing system: ServiceNow; msp involvement: MSP supports Microsoft 365, endpoint management, and backup monitoring.. Activities are tracked through ServiceNow when workflow evidence is required, and control operation is reviewed against the assessment objectives: a. Malicious Code Protection is documented and implemented. b. Malicious Code Protection is reviewed for assessment evidence.

Connections include Microsoft 365 GCC High; Azure Government; managed Windows endpoints; remote users, identity services, managed endpoints, backup services, security monitoring, and approved external provider connections. Each connection must have an owner, purpose, authorization, and CUI impact review.

CUI is created at: CUI is created by authorized employees during contract, engineering, and project support activities.. CUI is stored in: CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint libraries and approved managed endpoints.. CUI is transmitted through: CUI is transmitted through approved encrypted collaboration and email channels.. CUI is archived in: CUI is archived in approved backup and retention repositories..

Remote users authenticate through Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access to access Microsoft 365 GCC High; Azure Government; managed Windows endpoints; remote users. Managed endpoints are controlled by Microsoft Intune and monitored by the security stack.
Microsoft Entra ID MFA with conditional access
Microsoft 365 GCC High; Azure Government; managed Windows endpoints; remote users
CUI is stored in GCC High SharePoint sites and processed on managed Windows endpoints.

The SSP maps CMMC Level 2 / NIST SP 800-171 requirements across AC, AT, AU, CM, IA, IR, MA, MP, PE, PS, RA, CA, SC, and SI. Detailed implementation statements are pulled into the Control Implementations section.
Missing control implementation: Review Control Implementations section for placeholder text.
